title: Presence
Is Not
Optional.
items.body: Every line of code is a choice. Every decision, deliberate. Move with full attention or don't move at all.

title: Change
Is The
Engine.
items.body: In Aztec cosmology, the fifth sun was born from sacrifice. Transformation is not failure — it is the source code.

title: Build
Like It
Matters.
items.body: Software that people rely on. Tools that hold up. Ideas that outlast the hype cycle. Because it does.
